top_signals.title: Hong Kong Begins Trial Operation of New Gold Clearing System
top_signals.summary: Hong Kong has launched a trial operation of a new gold clearing system, backed by several major banks, in a key step toward its ambition to become a major bullion-trading hub with price-setting power.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: A Catholic Security Scholar’s Case for Responsible Military AI
top_signals.summary:
What do you do when two identities that make up your deepest self find themselves on opposite sides of a moral and spiritual battlefield?I am Catholic. I have been one for over 20 years since I made the life-altering decision to join a friend for Mass one day. My faith became a spiritual and ethical foundation at a time I sorely needed it, so much so that for a time, I contemplated entering the priesthood, which replaced my previous career goal of entering the CIA. I eventually realized that teaching was my true calling and decided to pursue that path

The post A Catholic Security Scholar’s Case for Responsible Military AI appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ukrainian media outlets now among 'priority targets' for Russian hackers
top_signals.summary: A top Ukrainian security official described two previously unreported attacks on TV media organizations and said Russia has ramped up hacking activities against the industry.

top_signals.title: Japan-linked ships escape Hormuz in convoy through Iran route
top_signals.summary: The vessels include five supertankers, each capable of hauling 2 million barrels of crude, two chemical tankers and a car carrier.

top_signals.title: South Korea's Hanwha loses major Canadian submarine deal
Microsoft cuts 4,800 jobs, as Xbox unit downsizes and plans to spin off four gaming studios
top_signals.summary: Microsoft is cutting jobs in its commercial business and its Xbox gaming group, where revenue has been shrinking.

top_signals.title: Ripple secures full MiCA license for crypto services across Europe
top_signals.summary: The Luxembourg approval completes the company's MiCA licensing process, enabling it to provide regulated crypto-asset services across the European Economic Area.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Seven & I’s former supermarket unit may acquire more under Bain
top_signals.summary: The 7-Eleven operator sold off the business as it sought to revamp itself and focus on convenience stores following an unsolicited takeover proposal from Alimentation Couche-Tard.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Paradigm leads $5.5 million seed round in M1X Global to expand tokenized sovereign debt platform
top_signals.summary: M1X Global, which worked with the Republic of the Marshall Islands on the issuance of the onchain sovereign bond USDM1, has raised funds.
